import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { ChevronLeft, Target, Calendar, DollarSign } from 'lucide-react'; export default function CreateGoalScreen({ onBack, onSave }) { const [goalName, setGoalName] = useState(''); const [amount, setAmount] = useState(''); const [date, setDate] = useState(''); const handleSave = () => { if (!goalName || !amount || !date) return; onSave({ title: goalName, current: 0, target: Number(amount), date, color: 'bg-emerald-500' }); }; return (
{/* Header */}
